novel_notes:
Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction
	
		
	Wasn’t killed by Cheng Pu but would live on to aid Wang Yun then Li Jue.
	Haunted to death by a man he had executed.

full_text:
Hu Zhen (Wencai) 胡軫 (文才)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hu Zhen (胡軫), styledWencai (文才). Led an army to oppose Sun Jian but was defeated. Hu Zhen was affiliated with Dong Zhuo and Li Jue.
